_note: EXAMPLE creative-bible inspired by 'Fern' YouTube channel (20M views/month). 3D mannequin documentary format works for: bizarre history, true crime, mysteries, dark stories, lost civilizations. Higgsfield, Meta AI, Google Flow all handle this style natively. Discovered via Jacksons AI tutorial 2026-05-27.

style_signature.label: 3d-mannequin-documentary-cinematic
style_signature.description: Vertical/horizontal 3D-rendered scenes with faceless mannequin characters (smooth heads, monochrome suits in red/blue/grey/black). Cinematic dark lighting, slow camera moves, dramatic narration. Each scene = single 3D environment with 2-3 mannequins acting out an event. Aesthetic: stylized minimalism meets documentary realism. Inspired by Fern, Meet Arnold, and similar channels pulling millions of views monthly with $6+ RPM.

reference_outliers.what_to_borrow: Mannequin character design (suit + smooth head), dramatic music-synced cuts, documentary narration with emotion shifts
Cinematic camera moves, dark lighting, sepia-cinematic grade

key_visual_techniques: Monochrome suit colors (red / blue / grey / black) — one color per character role
Soft cinematic lighting (key + rim, no harsh shadows)
Camera tracking + slow zoom shots (no static framing)
Color grading: cinematic teal-and-orange OR sepia-warm for historical
Music-synced cuts on bass hits + drops
Yellow / white Impact text overlays on hook + twist moments
Lower-third dark gradient to anchor captions

asset_sources_per_scene_type.scene_b_roll: meta-flow-gen (style: '3d mannequin documentary, faceless characters, cinematic') for free unlimited gens
asset_sources_per_scene_type.scene_b_roll_premium: higgsfield-generate with reference image of mannequin (Soul ID for character consistency)

production_recipe._note: Tier 0 (Meta AI / Google Flow) sufficient for 90% of shots. Use Higgsfield only when recurring character consistency required (e.g. 'the red-suit mannequin returns in every video').

style_signature._note_long_form: Same style scales to long-form 8-30min (Fern's actual format). For long-form: increase duration_range to [480, 1800] and use chapter mode with 12-30 chapters.

characters._note: 2-3 recurring mannequin characters give the channel its signature. Train via character-forge with Higgsfield Soul ID.

cast.name: Narrator-Red
cast.appearance: Faceless mannequin in a deep-red business suit, white shirt, black tie. Stands neutral. Smooth featureless head.

cast.name: Counterpart-Blue
cast.appearance: Faceless mannequin in navy-blue suit. Same body structure as Narrator-Red.

_curated_tracks_by_mood._source: YouTube Audio Library, filter genre=Cinematic, mood=Dramatic/Tense/Epic

thumbnail_style.pattern_description: Closeup on a 3D mannequin character (red or blue suit), big yellow Impact text top with 3-5 words ('THE SECRET', 'WHAT THEY HID', etc.), red arrow pointing to a key detail in the scene. Dark cinematic background.

_starter_master_prompt_for_claude: You are creating a 3D mannequin documentary YouTube Short. Style: faceless mannequins in monochrome suits, cinematic dark lighting, music-synced cuts, yellow Impact text overlays, dramatic ElevenLabs narration with [emotion] tags. Output 4-6 chapters of 8-12s each, with multi-shot prompts for Seedance/Google Flow. Topic: __TOPIC__. Generate in this order: (1) hook title (2) 4-6 chapter breakdown (3) per-chapter voiceover with [emotion] tags (4) multi-shot visual prompts (5) text overlay placements (6) music cue per chapter (7) thumbnail concepts ×3.
